name: recover-from-false-positive
description: Recover Claude Code sessions after an Anthropic API output-classifier false positive (the "cyber-related safeguards" / "appears to violate our Usage Policy" hard failure). A JSON-aware .jsonl log surgeon that surgically removes the triggering message + refusal turn and re-stitches the parentUuid chain so the session resumes cleanly, cleans accumulated refusals across old sessions, and installs a per-repo CLAUDE.md framing guard to stop recurrence.
